modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with adding or removing owners in a Listserv

full_description_text:  
So, the user wants to add themselves as an admin to the listserv. They also mentioned needing to add some colleagues to the list. There’s confusion about how to add new members and even remove some owners. It’s a bit of a mess with the listserv stuff.
short_description: Issues with adding or removing owners in a Listserv
description: So, the user wants to add themselves as an admin to the listserv. They also mentioned needing to add some colleagues to the list. There’s confusion about how to add new members and even remove some owners. It’s a bit of a mess with the listserv stuff.
